plan.md plnd--O9109-rename-plan-to-pr-ph-03-09-2222 ref.json

8:Erk's internal APIs use "plan" terminology (PlanService, plan_number, plan_id, etc.) but these entities are actually GitHub draft PRs. This rename aligns internal naming with reality. Phase 1 covers the core type definitions, gateway ABC, and all their direct consumers — the foundational layer that everything else builds on. 24: - `close_plan(plan_id, plan_url)` → `close_pr(pr_number, pr_url)` 25: - `dispatch_to_queue(plan_id, plan_url)` → `dispatch_to_queue(pr_number, pr_url)` 26: - `fetch_plan_content(plan_id, plan_body)` → `fetch_pr_content(pr_number, pr_body)` 27: - `fetch_objective_content(plan_id, plan_body)` → `fetch_objective_content(pr_number, pr_body)` 29: - Internal helper `_close_linked_prs_http(plan_id, ...)` → `_close_linked_prs_http(pr_number, ...)` 31: - `_plan_content_by_plan_id` → `_pr_content_by_pr_number` 32: - `_objective_content_by_plan_id` → `_objective_content_by_pr_number` 33: - `set_plan_content(plan_id, ...)` → `set_pr_content(pr_number, ...)` 34: - `set_objective_content(plan_id, ...)` → `set_objective_content(pr_number, ...)` 40:- `Plan.plan_identifier` → `Plan.pr_identifier` 41:- `CreatePlanResult.plan_id` → `CreatePlanResult.pr_id` 42:- `PlanNotFound.plan_id` → `PlanNotFound.pr_id` 45:- `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.plan_number` → `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.pr_number` 46:- `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.plan_url` → `CreatePlanDraftPRResult.pr_url` 50:Plans are PRs, so `PlanNumberEvent` and `PrNumberEvent` are the same concept. Similarly, `CommandResult.plan_number` is redundant with `CommandResult.pr_number`. 55:- **Remove `plan_number`** field from `CommandResult` 66:- Remove `plan_number` variable tracking 67:- Remove `plan_number` from `CommandResult` construction 71:- Remove `plan_number` key from `extract_pr_metadata_from_text()` return dict 72:- Remove `plan_number` from `parse_stream_json_line()` return dict 75:- Remove `_simulated_plan_number` and `PlanNumberEvent` usage 80:- `PlanNextSteps.plan_number` → `PlanNextSteps.pr_number` 81:- `format_plan_next_steps_plain(plan_number, ...)` → `format_plan_next_steps_plain(pr_number, ...)` 82:- `format_next_steps_markdown(plan_number, ...)` → `format_next_steps_markdown(pr_number, ...)` 83:- Update internal string references: `self.plan_number` → `self.pr_number` 89:Replace existing `_migrate_issue_number_to_plan_number()` with a unified migration: 92: """Migrate legacy issue_number or plan_number to pr_number.""" 95: if "plan_number" in data and "pr_number" not in data: 96: data["pr_number"] = data.pop("plan_number")
... [22 lines omitted] ...
